name: Chocolate Topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the milk, baking chocolate, cornstarch, granulated sugar replacement, and salt in a saucepan.
2. Bring to a full boil over medium heat, stirring occasionally.
3. Boil for 2 to 3 minutes until thickened.
4. Remove from heat and stir in the butter and vanilla extract.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
